title: Super Mario Paint - THE WORLD REVOLVING / Jevil's Theme (Deltarune)
description:
Reupload because I completely friggin' forgot a couple stanzas when I first recorded the arrangement. I was in a hurry today.

This is liable to be covered by a few other people inside the next week or two and I'm sure at least one of them will put mine to shame. Until then, have this.

Also take any midis you find of this with a grain of salt. Those arpeggios are NOT smooth up-down glides for most of the first half of the tune.
